title: Living in Boulder Vlog 4 - 9 - 2017: I cracked, gotta get in shape

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog shirtless, explaining that physical pain (back and arm numbness from sitting) made him realize he needs to get in shape. He announces a new personal regimen he calls 'smoke bike' — getting high and cycling — and considers eventually signing up for an Ironman triathlon.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Has been neglecting his body and now feels compelled to start getting fit
Willing to deprioritize or abandon current website project to focus on riding and health
Views weed positively — calls it pure and strong, plans to smoke heavily as part of his new routine
Thinks he could do one even while out of shape, just for fun

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I cracked, so I'm doing my video with my shirt off.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm going to start writing my bio tomorrow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got up at around 10 and went to work.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My mom called me to help her with chores at her house.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My mom doesn't pay me for helping her, but she feeds me really good food.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I had to pick up my bike because I have to work tomorrow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went to my mom's house to upload files because it's faster there.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: At my mom's house, uploading files takes five seconds compared to five minutes at my place.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I started feeling excruciating pain in my back and arm while working.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The pain in my arm was so bad it went numb.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I generally feel numb when I hit myself.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The pain distracted me so much I couldn't concentrate.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I stood up and walked around to try to alleviate the pain.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think the pain might be due to long-term bad habits.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I compared my pain to ancient Roman stories of people dying of malnutrition.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I feel like I'm wasting my life.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think I need to start exercising.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I might have to ditch my website to focus on exercise.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I had a feeling it would be bad if I didn't finish my webpage today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm almost done with a super nice webpage and have a lot to be proud of.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think it's time to quit working on the webpage for now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to ride my bike, listen to music, and smoke weed.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The weed I'm smoking is pure and strong.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm smoking pure buds out of a pipe.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The weed is super cheap.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I can smoke as much as I want without it being a problem.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I don't like to talk about audiobooks after smoking weed because I can't remember them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm too high to talk coherently after smoking weed all day.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to focus on biking and taking baby steps.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm thinking about the miles I'll bike.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Tomorrow is my first day of work.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm calling my new routine 'Smoke Bike'.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Smoke Bike involves smoking weed all the time and biking.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll talk about my rides and vlogs in my routine.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I can sync my vlogs with the right background because I'll have more time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Working on my website makes me one-track-minded.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I don't have a program that plays consecutive songs automatically.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I might try to do a path Iron Man a day.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm out of shape, so I'll start with fins and battles.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I might sign up for an Iron Man this summer.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think I could finish an Iron Man without coming in last.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I might rent a fast bike for the Iron Man.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The idea is to get super high and fit.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm going to be really high and thin, not jiggly.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think I talked too long in this video.
